summary: Outstanding front‑of‑house audience capture with big, clear Phil bass; musical performance not detailed
review: The reviewer rates this recording a perfect five stars, preferring the FOB (front‑of‑house) audience mix to traditional soundboard tapes. They highlight a strong Phil Lesh bass presence that remains well‑balanced and not overly boomy, indicating excellent clarity in the crowd capture. No specific comments on song performance or set flow were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praises the audience capture and instrument balance; lack of show details limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear front‑of‑house audience capture with strong Phil bass presence, balanced without excessive boom.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were mentioned.

band_member_comments.Phil: Big bass presence noted as strong yet not overly boomy.
